name: Depthchaser Trap
description: History On release, the T7 trap gave +4 ATT on equip, which is less than the T6 Giantcatcher Trap. This was corrected in Exalt Version 1.0.1.0 (Aug 2020).
effects: On enemies: Inflicts Slowed for 5 (+0.1s per WIS over 34) seconds
Inflicts Slowed for 2.5 (+0.1s per WIS over 34) seconds
